PLAGUE_SPEAR.title: Plague Spear
PLAGUE_SPEAR.description: Monsters deal [blue]50%[/blue] more attack damage. Each additional [blue]1[/blue] stack adds another [blue]50%[/blue].
PLAGUE_SHIELD.title: Plague Shield
PLAGUE_SHIELD.description: Monsters gain [blue]75%[/blue] more max HP, block gain, and healing. Each additional [blue]1[/blue] stack adds another [blue]75%[/blue].
PLAGUE_SHIELD.flavor: Heavy enough to block time itself.
MIMIC_INFESTATION.title: Mimic Infestation
MIMIC_INFESTATION.description: Treasure rooms in later acts become elite fights. Elite fights no longer drop relics.
TIME_MAZE.title: Time Maze
TIME_MAZE.description: You cannot play more than [blue]15[/blue] cards each turn.
TIME_MAZE.flavor: The path still moves forward. Your steps do not.
MUZZLE.title: Muzzle
MUZZLE.description: You can no longer increase max HP. Healing you receive is [red]halved[/red].
MUZZLE.flavor: It tightens when breathing matters most.
HORRIBLE_TROPHY.title: Horrible Trophy
HORRIBLE_TROPHY.description: When obtained, add [blue]1[/blue] [red]Enthralled[/red] to your deck. Each later copy also adds [blue]1[/blue] [red]Enthralled[/red].
HORRIBLE_TROPHY.flavor: Stare too long and it will hang you with the rest.
